Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user is asking to construct an accepting Petri net for insurance claim management process with steps CR DV FC CA AP P N CL and loops for DV RDS back to DV and FC II back to FC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: From scenario description infer linear sequence with branches after DV and FC for loops using places after activities and decision transitions

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Propose places like p_start p_cr p_dv p_rds p_fc_in p_fc_res p_ii p_ca p_ap p_pay p_not p_sink and transitions labeled with activity names

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: To model loops correctly without concurrency issues use separate transitions for initial and repeat DV FC like t_dv_init t_dv_repeat t_fc_init t_fc_repeat

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Derive arcs from activity flow p_start to t_cr to p_cr to t_dv_init to p_dv then from p_dv to t_dv_success to p_fc_in and loop p_dv to t_dv_resub to p_rds to t_dv_repeat to p_dv

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For FC loop p_fc_in to t_fc_init to p_fc_res then p_fc_res to t_fc_ok to p_ca and p_fc_res to t_fc_flag to p_ii to t_fc_repeat to p_fc_in

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Treat Approval as sequential step without explicit threshold condition to simplify net

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Set im with token at p_start and fm with token at p_sink ensure arcs connect logically for accepting net

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Adjust transition names and loop structures to avoid naming conflicts and ensure proper re-entry to DV and FC without shared input places

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Construct Python code with imports create net add places transitions arcs define im fm
